name: Strawberry Fields
description: A photonic quantum-computing platform for modelling continuous-variable states, circuits, and optical quantum experiments.
whyUseIt: It gives a practical entry point into photonic and continuous-variable quantum systems, which are conceptually different from standard qubit-first gate-model workflows.
engineerWorkflow: Define optical states and operations, simulate the resulting system, and inspect how photonic architectures behave under loss and measurement choices.
managerExpects: A clear reason for choosing photonic tooling instead of defaulting to qubit-centric stacks.
demoDescription: Model a simple photonic state transformation and compare the result with an idealised expectation.
beginnerMistakes: Assuming continuous-variable systems behave exactly like standard qubit circuits
Ignoring loss and detector assumptions in photonic experiments
